description: Building and maintaining cloud infrastructure and MLOps pipelines for enterprise clients including Pixar, Hyundai, and L&T. Leading DevOps transformations using Kubernetes, ArgoCD, and Terraform.
Designed and managed CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration with Kubernetes, and cloud infrastructure automation on AWS.
Developed automated test frameworks, improved CI/CD pipeline reliability, and contributed to platform engineering initiatives.
Worked on quality assurance for enterprise middleware products, built automation frameworks, and collaborated with global engineering teams.
